nodes.name: Daily Warranty Check
nodes.notes: Runs daily at 7 AM AEDT. Checks for expiring warranties and updates statuses.

nodes.name: Mark Expiring Soon

parameters.query: UPDATE warranty_registrations SET status = 'expiring_soon' WHERE status = 'active' AND warranty_end BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE AND CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '30 days' RETURNING id, serial_number, product_code, account_zoho_id, warranty_end;

nodes.notes: Warranties expiring within 30 days are flagged.

parameters.query: UPDATE warranty_registrations SET status = 'expired' WHERE status IN ('active', 'expiring_soon') AND warranty_end < CURRENT_DATE RETURNING id, serial_number, product_code, account_zoho_id, warranty_end;

SELECT w.serial_number, w.product_code, w.variant, w.warranty_end, a.account_name, c.first_name || ' ' || c.last_name AS contact_name, c.email FROM warranty_registrations w LEFT JOIN zoho_accounts a ON a.zoho_id = w.account_zoho_id LEFT JOIN zoho_contacts c ON c.zoho_id = w.contact_zoho_id WHERE w.status = 'expiring_soon' ORDER BY w.warranty_end ASC;

parameters.subject: Warranty Alert — {{$json.length}} units expiring within 30 days
parameters.message:
Warranty Expiry Alert

The following units have warranties expiring within 30 days:

{{$json.details}}

Action required:
- Contact customer about extended warranty
- Update Zoho Desk if follow-up needed
- Check for any open claims before expiry

parameters.query: SELECT wc.id, wc.status, wc.issue_description, wc.claim_date, wr.serial_number, wr.product_code FROM warranty_claims wc JOIN warranty_registrations wr ON wr.id = wc.registration_id WHERE wc.status IN ('open', 'investigating') ORDER BY wc.claim_date ASC;

INSERT INTO event_log (event_type, entity_type, source, metadata) VALUES ('WarrantyCheckCompleted', 'system', 'warranty_engine', jsonb_build_object('expiring_soon', $1, 'newly_expired', $2, 'open_claims', $3));

INSERT INTO health_checks (component, last_run, status, message) VALUES ('warranty_engine', NOW(), 'ok', $1) ON CONFLICT (component) DO UPDATE SET last_run = EXCLUDED.last_run, status = EXCLUDED.status, message = EXCLUDED.message;

meta.description: Daily warranty lifecycle management. Marks warranties as expiring_soon (30-day window) or expired. Sends email alerts for expiring units. Tracks open claims. Runs at 7 AM daily.
